summary: Phase 5: Check in canonical schema/corpus-schema.sql + cross-repo drift CI

resolution.note: Phase 5 complete. schema/corpus-schema.sql pins the Postgres contract (6 tables, no indexes — HNSW built post-load in export.py). schema-drift.yml compares sha256 against the guru-web copy via GURU_WEB_REPO repo variable. User action required: set GURU_WEB_REPO under repo Settings → Variables → Actions once guru-web exists.
